summary: Iteration 29 - Validation Hub restructure with SciPost pairwise comparison feature testing. All 11 backend API tests passed. Frontend testing verified all sidebar navigation items, section headers, and empty state handling for SciPost pairwise. Old /pairwise and /scipost routes correctly show blank pages (removed from router).

backend: GET /api/scipost/pairwise/status returns 200 with required fields (total_pairs, ai_completed, ai_failed, ai_pending, by_dimension, fetching, running, progress)
GET /api/scipost/pairwise/results returns status=no_data when collection is empty
GET /api/pairwise/results returns ok with majority_agreement data
GET /api/scipost/results returns ok with prompts field
GET /api/validation/datasets returns 3 datasets (ICLR LLMs, ICLR Protein Science, PeerRead ACL 2017)
GET /api/validation/pairwise-results returns correlation data for iclr-llm
GET /api/validation/irt-results returns IRT scores for iclr-llm
Validation API accessible (navbar link should work)
SciPost pairwise empty state returns no_data status
frontend: Validation hub page loads at /validation with title 'Validation'
Pairwise group has Qeios and SciPost items (nav-pw-qeios, nav-pw-scipost)
Tournament group has all 3 datasets dynamically loaded (nav-t-iclr-llm, nav-t-iclr-protein, nav-t-peerread_acl_2017)
Clicking Pairwise > Qeios shows section title 'Pairwise — Qeios' with 330 pairs stats
Clicking Pairwise > SciPost shows section title 'Pairwise — SciPost' with empty state message
Clicking Single-item > SciPost shows section title 'Single-item — SciPost' with 4 dimension cards (282 comparisons)
Clicking Tournament > ICLR LLMs shows section title 'Tournament — ICLR LLMs' with ranking correlation data
Tournament DatasetView does not show duplicate header (hideHeader prop working)
Old /pairwise route shows blank page (route removed)
Old /scipost route shows blank page (route removed)

critical_code_review_comments: ValidationHubPage.jsx correctly implements unified hub with sidebar navigation
SciPostPairwiseSection.jsx correctly handles empty state with 'No pairwise comparisons yet' message
Backend /api/scipost/pairwise/* endpoints correctly added to scipost.py router
App.js routes updated - only /validation route active, old /pairwise and /scipost removed
Navbar.jsx simplified to only show Validation link (no separate Pairwise/SciPost links)
DatasetView component correctly uses hideHeader prop to avoid duplicate headers when embedded in hub
All data-testid attributes correctly implemented for testing
seed_data_creation: None - tested with existing data (330 Qeios pairs, 282 SciPost comparisons, 0 SciPost pairwise pairs)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 29 verified the Validation Hub restructure with new SciPost pairwise comparison feature. The unified /validation route provides a sidebar with 3 groups: (1) Pairwise (Qeios - 330 pairs, SciPost - empty), (2) Single-item (SciPost - 282 comparisons), (3) Tournament (ICLR LLMs - 73 papers, ICLR Protein - 46 papers, PeerRead ACL 2017 - 80 papers). Old /pairwise and /scipost routes removed. New endpoints: GET /api/scipost/pairwise/status, GET /api/scipost/pairwise/results. Admin-only POST endpoints for fetch-and-run, stop, reset.

validation_hub_page.description: Unified Validation hub with sidebar navigation

endpoints: GET /api/scipost/pairwise/status - returns status with total_pairs, ai_completed, etc.
GET /api/scipost/pairwise/results - returns no_data when empty, ok with analysis when data exists
scipost_pairwise_api.current_state: Empty (0 pairs) - shows 'No pairwise comparisons yet' message

old_routes_removed./pairwise: Shows blank page (route removed from App.js)
old_routes_removed./scipost: Shows blank page (route removed from App.js)

navbar_simplified.description: Only Validation link visible in navbar, no separate Pairwise or SciPost links

tournament_dataset_view.description: DatasetView component with hideHeader prop prevents duplicate headers when embedded in hub
